Marwa Gamal is a web designer with contact information including email, phone number, GitHub, LinkedIn, and a personal website.
Marwa Gamal received a B.E. in Computer Science Engineering from G.H.Raisoni College of Engineering in Nagpur, India in January 2015.
From February 2015 to May 2017, Marwa Gamal worked as a full-time Web Designer at Trust Systems and Software in Nagpur, India, where she renovated the UI for TrustBank-CBS and other projects.

From June 2017 to December 2018, Marwa Gamal worked as a Freelance Web Designer & Developer for Jallosh Band & An Endeavor Foundation, remotely, handling client communication, mock-ups, and website development.
Since January 2019, Marwa Gamal has been working part-time as a Digital Data & Client Relations Specialist at 10MagicalFingers, remotely, managing client interactions and digital data.

Marwa Gamal designed and hosted websites for TSR Technology Services, Vidarbha Merchants Urban Co-Op Bank, GISSS, and Softtrust USA, understanding client requirements and managing the full development lifecycle.
Marwa Gamal also worked on the website for An Endeavor Foundation, collaborating with the client to define requirements and deliver a fully designed website.

The individual possesses skills in web technologies such as Angular JS, HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Bootstrap, Jquery, Javascript, and Angular 4, as well as software like Brackets, Visual Studio, Photoshop, and Visual Studio Code. They also have design and tool skills including UI/UX Design, Photoshop, and Mock-up Creation, along with client communication and digital data management skills.
From 2013 to 2014, the individual worked as a Web Designer for the College Magazine OCEAN G.H.Raisoni College of Engineering in Nagpur, India, contributing to the magazine's design and layout.
In October 2009, the individual participated in a state-level photography competition, Click Maharashtra State Board, in Nagpur, India, showcasing their creative skills.

India is a land where aspirations take root and flourish, a backdrop for both established institutions and burgeoning talent. It’s a nation woven with a history of artistic expression, evidenced by events like the ‘Click Maharashtra State Board’ photography competition held within its borders. Nagpur, a city nestled within India’s heartland, serves as a focal point for education and opportunity. It’s here, at G.H.Raisoni College of Engineering, that individuals like Marwa Gamal begin their journeys, earning degrees in fields like Computer Science Engineering – a testament to India’s growing technological landscape. 

Nagpur also provides a proving ground for early career development. Gamal honed her skills as a Web Designer, first contributing to the vibrant aesthetic of the college magazine, OCEAN, and later taking on full-time roles at companies like Trust Systems and Software. Within these companies, she didn’t merely design; she *renovated*, breathing new life into interfaces like TrustBank-CBS, demonstrating a practical application of her education and a commitment to improving user experience. India, therefore, isn’t simply a geographical location, but a dynamic ecosystem supporting the growth of skilled professionals and fostering innovation. It’s a place where creative pursuits are encouraged, technical expertise is cultivated, and individuals find the space to build their futures.

Nagpur is a city steeped in opportunity, a rising hub within India where ambition takes form. It’s a place where education and industry intertwine, notably through institutions like G.H. Raisoni College of Engineering – a cornerstone for aspiring technologists. The city nurtured Marwa Gamal’s early career, providing the backdrop for her Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science Engineering from Raisoni in 2015. It was here, within Nagpur’s growing tech sector, that she honed her skills as a Web Designer at Trust Systems and Software, breathing new life into the user interface of TrustBank-CBS and other projects between 2015 and 2017. 

Even before entering the professional world, Nagpur fostered Gamal’s creative talents; she contributed her design expertise to OCEAN, the magazine of G.H. Raisoni College of Engineering, from 2013 to 2014. The city also provided a platform for artistic expression beyond the academic sphere, hosting the Click Maharashtra State Board photography competition in 2009, where Gamal showcased her visual artistry. Nagpur isn’t merely a location, but a catalyst – a place where skills are learned, careers are launched, and creative passions are publicly displayed. It’s a city that quietly supports the growth of those who call it home, and those who pass through its vibrant landscape.

Marwa Gamal is a versatile web designer and developer, a digital architect who bridges the gap between client vision and functional online presence. A 2015 graduate of G.H. Raisoni College of Engineering with a degree in Computer Science, she quickly transitioned from academic theory to practical application, beginning her career at Trust Systems and Software in Nagpur, India. There, she honed her UI skills, breathing new life into the interfaces of projects like TrustBank-CBS, Loan Bazar, Capital Security Bond Application, SoftGST, and Trust Analytica. 

Driven by a desire for creative freedom and direct client engagement, Marwa moved into freelance work in 2017, partnering with clients like Jallosh Band & An Endeavor Foundation. This period showcased her ability to manage projects independently – from initial client consultations and mock-up creation to full website development and deployment, all conducted remotely. She has since extended her portfolio to include websites for TSR Technology Services, Vidarbha Merchants Urban Co-Op Bank, GISSS, and Softtrust USA, consistently demonstrating a knack for understanding and translating client needs into compelling digital experiences. 

Currently, Marwa balances her design work with a part-time role as a Digital Data & Client Relations Specialist at 10MagicalFingers, a position she’s held since 2019, further refining her communication and data management skills. She maintains an active online presence through her portfolio website (marwagamal.com), LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/marwa-gamal), and GitHub (github.com/marwa-gamal), and can be reached via email (marwa.gamal@email.com) or phone (+20 101 234 5678). Her career is defined by a consistent commitment to remote collaboration and a full-stack approach to web development.
